questions.question: What does HTML stand for?
questions.explanation: HTML stands for Hyper Text Markup Language, which is the standard markup language for creating web pages.

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a JavaScript data type?
questions.explanation: JavaScript doesn't have a specific 'Float' data type. Numbers in JavaScript are all stored as double-precision floating-point numbers.

questions.question: What is the time complexity of binary search?
questions.explanation: Binary search has O(log n) time complexity because it eliminates half of the remaining elements in each step.

questions.question: Which CSS property is used to change the text color?
questions.explanation: The 'color' property in CSS is used to set the color of text content.

questions.question: What does SQL stand for?
questions.explanation: SQL stands for Structured Query Language, used for managing and manipulating relational databases.

metadata.title: Sample Computer Science Questions
metadata.description: A collection of sample questions covering web development, programming, and computer science fundamentals.
